hypothesis: For MOFs containing 3d transition metals (Cr, Mn, Fe, Co, Ni), augmenting the ∆-learning XGBoost model with per-metal electronic descriptors—formal oxidation state, coordination number, average metal–ligand bond length, and metal partial charge/spin density computed from a single-point GFN1-xTB calculation—will reduce the HSE06 band gap prediction MAE for this subset by at least 30% compared to the original ∆-learning model without these descriptors.
